nasb.text: Now on one of those days Jesus and His disciples got into a boat, and He said to them, “Let us go over to the other side of the lake.” So they launched out.

esv.text: One day he got into a boat with his disciples, and he said to them, “Let us go across to the other side of the lake.” So they set out,

cnv.text: 有一天，耶穌和門徒上了船，他對他們說：“我們渡到海那邊去吧。”他們就開了船。

ccb.text: 有一天，耶稣对门徒说：“我们到湖的对岸去吧。”于是他们坐船前往对岸。

csbs.text: 就在那些日子里，有一天耶稣和他的门徒们上了船，耶稣对他们说：“我们渡到湖对岸去吧。”他们就出发了。
